note: Frozen LIVE state at end of thread. Superseded items (the 100% rollout decision, the DB-connection-leak hypothesis) are deliberately ABSENT — reporting them as current is a hallucination, not a hit. Authored before the harness.

active_claims.what: the new ranking service double-counts request retries at full traffic, which caused the checkout error spike

active_constraints.what: checkout error rate must stay below 0.1 percent

decisions.what: roll out via a 5 percent canary; the earlier decision to go to 100 percent was reversed after the checkout error spike

open_conflicts.what: path forward: SRE wants a full rollback to the old ranking service vs product wants to stay on the canary and roll forward after the fix

open_questions.what: how to fix the retries: make the retry logic idempotent or add idempotency keys at the gateway
